subject: [Pre-read] CB FP&A monthly Initiatives and Update_Feb'25

content.answer:
Hi Ian and Jianghong,

Pls kindly find tmr's CB FP&A monthly initiatives updates, we will be
covering the following topics.


*1. CB Performance update2. Key Initiatives Updates*

   - CB P&L Projection Accuracy Improvement Initiatives
   - All BU: Shopee CB Foregone Revenue Summary
   - Marketplace P&L: Mall commission charge rate review and proposal
   - SLS P&L:  Alert on TH tax cost occuring and BR tax cost over-charge
   - Choice P&L: breakeven risk with platform fees increase
   - Warehouse P&L debrief

Best.

*Faye Yan*
